Is it possible to totally remove the wrong perceptions from the subconscious mind?

The conscious mind and the subconscious mind, or the unconscious mind.
To remove things from our subconscious mind, it is a mechanical process, just like a machine.

It is a programming of emotions.
It is a programming of thinking, feelings.
